date_notes: First rejection vote dated 2025-05-06 (CTV News Edmonton; mediator's recommendation). Corrects prior internal-file date of 2025-03-31. Distinct from the second rejection (tentative agreement) in late September 2025.
title_en: Teachers reject mediator's recommendation in central bargaining
title_fr: Les enseignants rejettent la recommandation du médiateur lors des négociations centrales
description_en: Alberta Teachers' Association members vote to reject a mediator's recommendation for a new provincial collective agreement, opening the path to a possible strike vote. This is the first of two rejection votes; teachers reject a tentative agreement again in late September 2025. Core unresolved issues include salary, class size, and classroom complexity.
verification_notes: Sourced to CTV News Edmonton (R-ata-mediator-rejection-2025), 2025-05-06; date and framing corrected from internal-file stub. Ready for verification sign-off — flip needs_verification to false to publish.

update_log.change: Date and framing corrected to 2025-05-06 'mediator's recommendation' per CTV (R-ata-mediator-rejection-2025), replacing internal-file date 2025-03-31.
